items.title: 2026/578: Methodist Church, Hurstlands, Hurst Green, Oxted, Surrey, RH8 0HG
items.description: Demolition of deconsecrated church building. Redevelopment of former methodist church site to provide a four-storey block of sixteen flats, comprising six one-bedroom flats, eight two-bedroom flats and two three-bedroom flats
items.headline: Plans Submitted for 16 Flats on Former Hurst Green Church Site
items.summary: A planning application proposes demolishing the deconsecrated Methodist Church on Hurstlands and replacing it with a four-storey block of 16 flats. The scheme would provide six one-bedroom, eight two-bedroom and two three-bedroom homes.

data.address: Methodist Church, Hurstlands, Hurst Green, Oxted, Surrey, RH8 0HG

items.summary: A planning application has been submitted to subdivide the grounds of Foyle Cottage in Red Lane, Limpsfield, and build three detached houses. The proposal includes new landscaping, parking and vehicle access.

data.address: Foyle Cottage, Red Lane, Limpsfield, Oxted, Surrey, RH8 0RT

items.title: 2026/743/TPO: 8 Farley Park, Oxted, Surrey, RH8 9HY
items.description:
Please refer to photos provided: 
T1) - Red Oak on right-hand side of front garden - To crown reduce to previous points, removing up to 2m growth to a residual height of 14m and crown spread of 11m. Crown lifted to 5m from ground level over road and 2.5m over garden / driveway. Removing limbs <10cm dia. Repeat pruning for good arboricultural management.
items.headline: Pruning planned for protected oak in Farley Park garden
items.summary: A tree application has been submitted for 8 Farley Park in Oxted to crown reduce and lift a protected red oak in the front garden. The work would trim up to 2m of growth and lift the canopy over the road, garden and driveway.

data.address: 8 Farley Park, Oxted, Surrey, RH8 9HY

items.summary: A planning application has been made to remove a half-broken branch from a Corsican pine at Hunters End on Uvedale Road, Limpsfield. The branch has twisted and now hangs over the property, and the request is to cut it back to the main stem.
